onset.Description: Time in seconds from the start of the acquisition.

duration.Description: Duration of the event in seconds.

Levels.Instruction: Presentation of an instruction consisting of a facial expression (happy or sad, looking right or left), enclosed within a frame (red or green in either a rectangle or diamond shape).
Levels.Correct_f: Moment at which the correct button was pressed.
Levels.Error_f: Moment at which the incorrect button was pressed.
Levels.Fdbck_corr: Moment at which feedback for a correct response was given.
Levels.Fdbck_err: Moment at which feedback for an error was given.
Levels.Change_rule: Moment at which some rules reversed at the middle of the run.

Levels.1: Happy face looking left, enclosed within a green rectangular frame.
Levels.2: Happy face looking right, enclosed within a green rectangular frame.
Levels.3: Sad face looking left, enclosed within a green rectangular frame.
Levels.4: Sad face looking right, enclosed within a green rectangular frame.
Levels.5: Happy face looking left, enclosed within a green diamond-shaped frame.
Levels.6: Happy face looking right, enclosed within a green diamond-shaped frame.
Levels.7: Sad face looking left, enclosed within a green diamond-shaped frame.
Levels.8: Sad face looking right, enclosed within a green diamond-shaped frame.
Levels.9: Happy face looking left, enclosed within a red rectangular frame.
Levels.10: Happy face looking right, enclosed within a red rectangular frame.
Levels.11: Sad face looking left, enclosed within a red rectangular frame.
Levels.12: Sad face looking right, enclosed within a red rectangular frame.
Levels.13: Happy face looking left, enclosed within a red diamond-shaped frame.
Levels.14: Happy face looking right, enclosed within a red diamond-shaped frame.
Levels.15: Sad face looking left, enclosed within a red diamond-shaped frame.
Levels.16: Sad face looking right, enclosed within a red diamond-shaped frame.
